bio.text: I'm **Kyle De Vares**, a creative digital artist with strong skills in Photoshop, branding, and illustration. I run a freelance commission service and online store, blending design and tech to deliver bold, custom visuals.

With a **BSc (HONS) in Computer Science & Higher National Diploma in Digital Media** from University College Jersey, plus a **BTEC in Creative Digital Media** from Highlands College Jersey, I bring both technical expertise and creative vision to every project.

My recent experience includes a **Web Developer Internship at IPOP Digitals** (Oct 2023 - Mar 2024), where I built and maintained responsive websites using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, fixed bugs, and collaborated with development teams using Git and Agile methodologies.
When I'm not coding or designing, you'll find me enjoying **TTRP gaming, digital art, reading, sewing, and music**. Ready to grow in a collaborative, design-driven team!
